title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal is reported to be delivering 40% more capabilities in 2026 using AI, with high-adoption teams deploying daily and completing a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6 times faster than baseline. Cursor highlights this as an example of AI expanding developer productivity beyond efficiency gains.
